/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test01.dir/test01.c.o -o test01  libMatrix.a
